preamble: The spontaneous diphthongization of open 'e' in stressed syllables is a hallmark of several Romance languages, where a monophthong splits into a gliding sound.

examples.note: Latin open 'e' diphthongizes in stressed syllables in Spanish.
Latin open 'e' diphthongizes in open stressed syllables in Italian.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
